title: Now That TikTok is Banned | #shorts
full_text: things to do now the Tik Tok is banned number one now you have lots of time to study for the mcats number two take the bar exam for fun Kim Kardashian does it number three clean out your closet you know that's been pending since 2018 and whatever you do do not go running to red note that defeats the whole purpose of the band but if it's fun then tell me okay then let's all go
